/loop This is Loop 2 (Feature Development Loop) for the AI-ASM WASM OS project at /home/a/aiasm-v0.1.

Read the current development prompt from /home/a/aiasm-v0.1/.loop/prompt. Focus on implementing P2 and P3 priority features from the development plan. After completing work, write an updated development prompt to /home/a/aiasm-v0.1/.loop/prompt with new bugs found and progress made.

Priority features to work on:
- Layer A (汇编底层): FD offset tracking, sys_open flags, VFS data area fix, e1000 IRQ PIC unmask, utils_memset fix, WASM bounds checking, FAT32 write support
- Layer B (WASM中间层): FAT chain following, file path resolution, VFS/FAT32 file deletion, TCP handshake, DHCP client, ARP cache timeout
- Layer C (外层应用): FAT32 WASM file loading, shell line editing, WASM module validation

After each cycle, commit any changes with message: "feat: [description of what was implemented]"
